title: Colorful Anvils Unoffical Port
description: Add colors and formatting to item names in anvils using & codes! Supports &c (red), &l (bold), hex colors, gradients, and more. Unofficial port for 1.21.8+.
body:
🎨 Use formatting codes in anvils to style your item names!

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Server-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/ZPXPEXdQQ9)

This is an unofficial port of [Colorful Anvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorfulanvils) by rogi27 for Minecraft 1.21.8+.

## How to Use
1. Place an item in an anvil
2. Type your name with formatting codes (e.g. `&c&lFire Sword`)
3. Take the item - it now has colored text!

Check the **gallery** for examples of each formatting style!

## ✨ No Character Limit
Vanilla Minecraft limits anvil input to 50 characters. This mod removes that limit, so you can type long gradients, lore lines, and complex formatting without being cut off.

## Formatting Codes
| Code | Effect |
|------|--------|
| `&0`–`&9`, `&a`–`&f` | Colors |
| `&l` | **Bold** |
| `&o` | *Italic* |
| `&n` | Underline |
| `&m` | ~~Strikethrough~~ |
| `&k` | Obfuscated |
| `&r` | Reset |
| `&#RRGGBB` | Hex color |
| `&&c` | Escape (shows literal `&c`) |

## Advanced
- `<gradient:#ff0000:#00ff00>text</gradient>` - Gradient
- `<rainbow>text</rainbow>` - Rainbow

## Lore Support
Add lore lines using `|` as separator:
- `&c&lFire Sword|&7Burns everything|&eDeals fire damage`

The first part becomes the name, everything after `|` becomes lore lines. Renaming without `|` clears any previous lore.

## Server Config
Config file at `config/colorfulanvils.json` toggle colors, formatting, hex, gradient, rainbow, and lore on/off. Optional permission support with fabric-permissions-api (disabled by default).

**Permissions** (when enabled):
- `colorfulanvils.use` — basic formatting
- `colorfulanvils.lore` — lore support
- `colorfulanvils.gradient` — gradient text
- `colorfulanvils.rainbow` — rainbow text

## Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.8+
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

## Credits
- Original mod by [rogi27](https://modrinth.com/user/rogi27)
- Uses [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) by Patbox

## 🐛 Bug Reports & Feature Requests
Found a bug or want a new feature? Join the Discord and let us know!

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Report%20Issues%20%26%20Suggest%20Features-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/ZPXPEXdQQ9)
